articles.headline: Fraud case against ex-Serie A referee chief dropped
articles.description: Milan's public prosecutor has dismissed the case against former Italian referee designator Gianluca Rocchi and his deputy Andrea Gervasoni for alleged sports fraud.

articles.headline: Spain's win vs. France ends incredible World Cup final streak
articles.description: For the past 11 World Cup finals, both Bayern Munich and Inter Milan had been represented. But that amazing streak is now over for one of those clubs.

articles.description: AS Roma are keen to land Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: New Napoli coach Allegri says Milan collapse 'weighed on me'
articles.description: Massimiliano Allegri is not looking for redemption at Napoli despite still being troubled by the end of his second spell in charge of AC Milan.

articles.headline: Transfer big board: Best players in each position who could move this summer
articles.description: The transfer window is open in Premier League and will be soon in Europe, so who is available? It's our big board!

images.name: Elliot Anderson [1296x729]
images.caption: Elliot Anderson is at the center of a bidding war between multiple Premier League clubs.
